The Spot: Workshops

The Spot is an inclusive movement studio offering specialized movement workshops.

These workshops are a 2 hour deep-dive into areas that often experience injury. Not a workout exactly, workshops are an opportunity to learn and practice stretching, mobilization, and strengthening techniques. They are suitable for all fitness levels.

Workshops are $50 each, plus tax.

Please email if you have any questions.

Book Your Workshop
